rules: No AI slop designs, no purple gradients, no Inter or Roboto.
Asymmetric left-aligned layouts with generous whitespace.
Subtle paper grain texture for the background to feel tactile.
Use real LCA-style data viz (gauges, donuts, bar comparisons).
Organic shapes with soft, nested radii for cards and images.

headings.usage: H1-H4, large impact numbers, quotes. Never use sans-serif for main headings.

body.usage: Paragraphs, data labels, technical report details, chips.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for marketing sections; Control Room Grid (Mode B) for dashboard/data views.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned text blocks, asymmetric image placements. Avoid centering paragraphs.

buttons.primary: bg-forest text-cream px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-outfit font-medium hover:bg-forest/90 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-forest/30 text-forest px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-outfit hover:bg-forest/5 transition-colors
buttons.chips: bg-sage/20 text-forest px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

cards.style: bg-white border border-charcoal/10 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(26,54,45,0.04)]

data_viz.gauge: Use Recharts PieChart as half-donut (startAngle 180, endAngle 0) for Green Score (A-E).
data_viz.timeline: Vertical left-aligned step timeline with subtle dashed border on left. Use 'sage' dots for milestones.
data_viz.bar_chart: Recharts BarChart for impact breakdown, using brand colors (forest, sage, ochre, terracotta). Hide grid lines, left align axis labels.

media.style: Cinematic, organic, highly textured real photography. No vector illustrations, no 3D renders. Photos should have soft nested rounded corners.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Ensure the hero section uses an editorial layout (e.g., massive Fraunces text over a left-aligned block, with the hero image spanning the right half).
In Tailwind config, extend colors with the provided brand hex codes and fonts.
Implement the 'paper grain' effect using a fixed background div with a tiny semi-transparent noise SVG pattern or CSS repeating-radial-gradient.
For the Green Score gauge, use Recharts with half-donut setup. Ensure it's visually prominent on the product detail page.
For the catalog, present products in an asymmetric grid rather than uniform squares.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='compare-packaging-button').
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto anywhere. Map sans to 'Outfit' and serif to 'Fraunces'.
